memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_Init

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the TI TMDS1204 with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the revision number of the TI device.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the TI TMDS1204 device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the TI TMDS1204 Device Revision Number.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 Lanes, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_LineRateReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function reconfigures the TI TMDS1204 cable redriver.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the revision number of the TI device.
specifies if the mode is FRL or TMDS.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the TI TMDS1204 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function prints out all the contents from TiRegisterFields array.
